---
title: "IPBES Data Management Vision"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    format-links: false
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
version <- Sys.getenv("IPBES_VERSION", unset = "development")
release_date <- substr(Sys.getenv("IPBES_RELEASE_DATE", unset = as.character(Sys.Date())), 1, 10)
doi <- Sys.getenv("IPBES_DOI", unset = "PENDING")
doi_url <- Sys.getenv("IPBES_DOI_URL", unset = "")
build_pdf <- tolower(Sys.getenv("IPBES_BUILD_PDF", unset = "false")) %in% c("1", "true", "yes", "y", "on")
if (identical(doi_url, "") && !identical(doi, "PENDING")) {
  doi_url <- paste0("https://doi.org/", doi)
}
pdf_line <- if (build_pdf) {
  "[Download latest PDF](assets/IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-latest.pdf)"
} else {
  "Generated in release/CI builds."
}
```

## Release Metadata

- **Version:** `r version`
- **Release date:** `r release_date`
- **DOI:** `r if (!identical(doi, "PENDING") && !identical(doi_url, "")) sprintf("[%s](%s)", doi, doi_url) else doi`
- **PDF:** `r pdf_line`
- **Timeline:** [View release timeline](timeline.html)

## About This Document

This is the living **IPBES Data Management Vision** document.

All changes are tracked in git and reviewed through pull requests.

## Scope

The document defines principles, implementation priorities, and governance for data management up to 2030.

## Citation

IPBES Data Management Vision, version `r version`, `r release_date`, DOI: `r doi`.
